one_time_description: Settlement revenue of $14,538,742 (2023: $21,341,364) recorded under Other Revenue
economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Mishkosiminiziibiing Development Corporation (MDC, 100% owned) and Big Grassy LP (99.9% owned). Commercial activities include Assabaska Park, Fisheries, and Pow Wow. New Gold common shares held as portfolio investment.
notes: Province is Ontario (Fort Frances area). Prior year audit was by BDO Canada LLP (before merger with MNP) and was qualified. Current year audit by MNP LLP is unqualified. Settlement revenue is very large ($14.5M in 2024, $21.3M in 2023) and is a recurring but variable item related to flooding and farming claims. An ISC interest-free loan of $2,237,742 was repaid during the year upon settlement of a flooding claim. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: MDC and Big Grassy LP. Tangible capital assets net book value calculated as $44,390,646 cost less $18,828,953 accumulated amortization = $25,561,693 (per schedule, closing net book value). Expenses_health and expenses_social are combined as Health and Social Services ($4,808,374). Band support/administration expense of $16,718,786 is unusually high likely due to large settlement-related salaries. Salaries expense of $17,926,734 in 2024 vs $4,958,758 in 2023 is a major anomaly likely tied to settlement distributions or reclassification.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
